programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Search and Rescue: Pups Save a Swept-Away Sweetheart; Search and Rescue: Mystery of the Missing Kitties
programs.desc: Ms. Marjorie is paddleboarding out to celebrate her anniversary with Hurricane Harrigan on Seal Island when she disappears!; Mayor Humdinger can't find his kitties, so he runs to the Safety and Rescue Pups for help!

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Aqua Pups Save a Floating Castle
programs.desc: When an unhappy Merpup tries to float Puplantis to the surface, it's up to the PAW Patrol and their newest member Coral to save the city and stop him.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.sub_title: The Park; The Lifeboat; Police Boat; Lucky Hamper; Mummy Pig's Book
programs.desc: Peppa and George go to the park; Grampy Rabbit shows how a lifeboat works; Peppa and George help the police; the Playgroup is raising money; Mummy Pig finishes writing her first book.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Pupmobiles
programs.desc: When Sid Swashbuckle and his pirate pooch, Arrby, swipe the pups' prestigious award, Ryder and the pups set out to recover it.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Sporting Goods Store; The Crew Plays Construction Vehicle Soccer
programs.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.

programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in his jump rope.
